summary: Created Foundry deploy script (script/Deploy.s.sol) with env-var-driven configuration. The script reads 6 address env vars and PRIVATE_KEY, validates all addresses are non-zero before broadcasting, deploys LPVault implementation (with _disableInitializers) then LPVaultFactory with all addresses as constructor args, and logs both deployed addresses. deploy() is public so tests can call it directly, avoiding vm.setEnv cross-test pollution. 18 tests cover happy path (10 assertions), zero-address validation (6 per-env-var), role separation revert, and verification-equivalent deployment.
